requirement_topic.en: ISED EMC — Interference-Causing Equipment and Radio Modules
requirement_topic.zh: ISED EMC——干扰设备及无线模块
requirement_topic.zht: ISED EMC——干擾設備及無線模組

summary.en: PV inverters with switching electronics can be interference-causing equipment, and connected models with Wi-Fi, cellular, Bluetooth, or other intentional transmitters may also fall under ISED radio equipment rules. The enforceable requirements arise from Canadian federal radiocommunication law and ISED standards. Applicable ICES or RSS standards depend on the specific design and wireless functions. ISED standards are technical compliance routes under the federal regime; the legal obligation is not satisfied by CE EMC or Chinese EMC reports alone.
summary.zh: 带开关电力电子的光伏逆变器可能属于干扰设备；带 Wi-Fi、蜂窝、蓝牙或其他有意发射器的联网型号还可能受 ISED 无线电设备规则约束。强制要求来源于加拿大联邦无线电通信法律及 ISED 标准。具体适用的 ICES 或 RSS 标准取决于产品设计和无线功能。ISED 标准是联邦制度下的技术合规路径；仅有 CE EMC 或中国 EMC 报告不能满足该法律义务。
summary.zht: 帶開關電力電子的光伏逆變器可能屬於干擾設備；帶 Wi-Fi、蜂窩、藍牙或其他有意發射器的聯網型號還可能受 ISED 無線電設備規則約束。強制要求來源於加拿大聯邦無線電通信法律及 ISED 標準。具體適用的 ICES 或 RSS 標準取決於產品設計和無線功能。ISED 標準是聯邦制度下的技術合規路徑；僅有 CE EMC 或中國 EMC 報告不能滿足該法律義務。

standards_or_laws: Radiocommunication Act and Radiocommunication Regulations — federal legal basis
ISED Interference-Causing Equipment Standards (ICES) — applicable by equipment class
ISED Radio Standards Specifications (RSS) — conditional for intentional transmitters

summary.en: Chinese manufacturers may hold GB/T 17626 immunity reports, GB 17625 harmonic/flicker reports, SRRC approvals for wireless modules, and CE EMC test reports. These are useful technical evidence but are not Canadian ISED equipment authorizations or Canadian interference-causing-equipment declarations.
summary.zh: 中国制造商可能持有 GB/T 17626 抗扰度报告、GB 17625 谐波/闪烁报告、无线模块 SRRC 核准及 CE EMC 测试报告。这些是有用技术证据，但不是加拿大 ISED 设备授权或加拿大干扰设备声明。
summary.zht: 中國製造商可能持有 GB/T 17626 抗擾度報告、GB 17625 諧波/閃爍報告、無線模組 SRRC 核准及 CE EMC 測試報告。這些是有用技術證據，但不是加拿大 ISED 設備授權或加拿大干擾設備聲明。

standards_or_laws: GB 17625 series — harmonic current and voltage fluctuation limits
SRRC approval — Chinese radio transmission equipment approval, not accepted as ISED authorization

gap.en: The key gap is scope classification. A base inverter, a gateway-equipped inverter, and a model with embedded wireless modules can require different ISED evidence and labels. Importers should map each SKU to the relevant ICES and RSS requirements, confirm whether module certification can be leveraged, and prepare Canadian EN/FR user notices where ISED requires them.
gap.zh: 关键差距在于适用范围分类。基础逆变器、带网关逆变器、嵌入无线模块的型号可能需要不同的 ISED 证据和标签。进口商应将每个 SKU 对应到相关 ICES 和 RSS 要求，确认是否可利用模块认证，并在 ISED 要求时准备加拿大英/法用户提示。
gap.zht: 關鍵差距在於適用範圍分類。基礎逆變器、帶閘道器逆變器、嵌入無線模組的型號可能需要不同的 ISED 證據和標籤。進口商應將每個 SKU 對應到相關 ICES 和 RSS 要求，確認是否可利用模組認證，並在 ISED 要求時準備加拿大英/法使用者提示。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory where the product is interference-causing equipment or includes radio apparatus under Canadian federal law. Individual ICES/RSS standards are technical routes under that regime and must be selected by product scope.
mandatory_status.cn: Not transferable — Chinese EMC, SRRC, or CE EMC reports do not automatically satisfy ISED requirements.

source.publisher: Innovation, Science and Economic Development Canada (ISED)

compliance_verdict.en: Informational only. Treat ISED EMC and radio compliance as a separate Canadian workstream from electrical safety certification and utility interconnection.
compliance_verdict.zh: 仅供参考。应将 ISED EMC 和无线合规作为独立于电气安全认证及电力公司并网的加拿大合规工作流处理。
compliance_verdict.zht: 僅供參考。應將 ISED EMC 和無線合規作為獨立於電氣安全認證及電力公司併網的加拿大合規工作流處理。
